p14_complete.label: P14 complete 5-asset tray smoke scenario
p14_complete.notes: Default P14 gate scenario. Three compatible token sources exercise robust multi-asset compartment layout; dice and meeples exercise mixed quick_asset_box presets without a global solver.
p14_complete.smoke_focus: 5 assets read, 3 generated asset modules, token module with 3 source compartments using deterministic_shelf_by_source_asset_v0, printability_report_v0, regenerate without duplicates

tokens.label: Two token sources, count-aware compartments and access notches
tokens.notes: Baseline P13/P14 token tray smoke case.
tokens.smoke_focus: two token compartments, internal wall, two top-open rectangular access notches

dice_meeples_generic.label: Mixed dice, meeples and generic parts
dice_meeples_generic.notes: Mixed source types exercise multiple generated asset candidates without a solver.
dice_meeples_generic.smoke_focus: multiple asset candidates, count-aware sizing, clear warnings that no global optimization is performed

cards_tokens.label: Sleeved card deck plus token source
cards_tokens.notes: For cards and sleeved_cards, z_mm is the total deck height; count is reported, not multiplied.
cards_tokens.smoke_focus: card deck z-height semantics, token count-aware sizing, report limitations visible

p15_tray_semantics.label: P15 tray semantics 5-asset low tray smoke scenario
p15_tray_semantics.notes: Default P15 semantics gate scenario. Five assets exercise flat_tray stack caps, XY expansion before Z, grid reservation reporting, compartments, access notches and printability warnings without a global solver.
p15_tray_semantics.smoke_focus: 5 assets read, low flat_tray modules, max_stack_height_mm reported, grid_semantics placement_reservation_lattice_v0, body_snap_to_grid no, compartments/access notches, printability_report_v0, regenerate without duplicates

p16_ergonomic_tray_packing.label: P16 ergonomic 2D tray packing smoke scenario
p16_ergonomic_tray_packing.notes: Default P16 gate scenario. Five assets exercise flat_tray_2d_v0 with multi-row pile grids, target aspect ratio, max module length reporting, compartments, access notches and printability warnings without a global solver.
p16_ergonomic_tray_packing.smoke_focus: flat_tray_2d_v0 visible, pile_grid_columns and pile_grid_rows reported, target_aspect_ratio 1.4, max_module_length_mm 70, linear_layout_avoided yes for token compartments, regenerate without duplicates
